description_long: This jewelry object features a distinctive design with three bulbous, textured elements arranged in a triangular formation, connected by curved, branch-like arms. The surface of each bulb is covered in a rough, knobby texture, giving the piece an organic, almost botanical appearance. A single, smooth, rounded loop arches above the three main elements, likely serving as a means of attachment or suspension. The central bulb is slightly smaller and positioned above the lower, larger bulb, while the two side bulbs are symmetrically placed. The entire piece appears to be cast from a dark, metallic material, possibly bronze or oxidized silver, with a matte finish. The overall form is bold and sculptural, suggesting a statement piece of jewelry with a naturalistic motif.
description: A sculptural, dark metallic pendant with three textured, bulbous forms connected by curved arms and a smooth loop for suspension. The design is organic and bold, with a rough, botanical surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three bulbous, textured elements and the arching loop clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and rounded profile of the bulbs, with the loop extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the symmetrical arrangement of the bulbs and the loop.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the vertical alignment and texture of the bulbs.
